// --- hint: Fault.UnionOps.g.cs
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
namespace Rasm.Specimen;

abstract partial record Fault
{
    partial record MissingCase
    {
        internal static readonly global::Rasm.Domain.Op SelfOp = global::Rasm.Domain.Op.Of(name: nameof(MissingCase));
    }

    partial record RejectedCase
    {
        internal static readonly global::Rasm.Domain.Op SelfOp = global::Rasm.Domain.Op.Of(name: nameof(RejectedCase));
    }

    partial record HiddenCase
    {
        internal static readonly global::Rasm.Domain.Op SelfOp = global::Rasm.Domain.Op.Of(name: nameof(HiddenCase));
    }
}

// --- hint: Toggle.UnionOps.g.cs
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
namespace Rasm.Specimen;

partial record Toggle
{
    partial record OnCase
    {
        internal static readonly global::Rasm.Domain.Op SelfOp = global::Rasm.Domain.Op.Of(name: nameof(OnCase));
    }

    partial record OffCase
    {
        internal static readonly global::Rasm.Domain.Op SelfOp = global::Rasm.Domain.Op.Of(name: nameof(OffCase));
    }
}
